purpose: Verify the direct TorchTitan canary launcher exposes the shared-KV query-recompute backward mode through check-config before the next sparse attention target-shape run.
command_shape: env TARGET_HOST=do-sonle5-mi350-gpu IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_GBS=64 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_STEPS=1 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=full CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_SWIGLU_BACKEND=triton CANARY_MORI_AITER_OP_CACHE_MODE=backward CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_MAX_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_BACKWARD_MODE=shared_kv CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_KERNEL_MODULE=torchtitan.models.deepseek_v4.sparse_mla_shared_kv_triton_forward_backend CANARY_SHAREDKV_BACKWARD_MODE=query_recompute CANARY_SHAREDKV_SCATTER_MODE=auto CANARY_LI_KL_BACKEND=triton_tl_dot CANARY_PERSIST_JIT_CACHE=auto launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh check-config

launcher_change.summary: check-config now forwards CANARY_SHAREDKV_BACKWARD_MODE and CANARY_SHAREDKV_SCATTER_MODE to the remote script, exports them into the container, and prints both requested and effective container env values.

read: The next sparse attention systems run can now be launched with query_recompute explicitly pinned and audited. This config proof does not measure performance; it only proves the intended shared-KV backward and scatter modes reach the container alongside LI triton_tl_dot and MORI routed padded VJP with Triton SwiGLU.
